title: How to automate a submitted form into a table board?
excerpt:

posts.author: martina.arguello (Martina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I’ve been trying now for while to find a way to automate the “WorkForms Submission viewer” into my table board , as a PDF.

So I know that once a person submits a form, this creates a “Ticket” into the table which it’s only a template and not the real form submitted. And I also know that once the forms are submitted, they are saved into a folder called “WorkForms Submission viewer” which only gives you the option to download as a picture or PDF. Is there a way I can connect this submitted forms into my Table Board automatically?

Thank you!

posts.author: michelle653burkes (michelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
To automate the “WorkForms Submission Viewer” into your table board as a PDF, first install the DocExport PDF Generator app in your monday.comaccount. Set up an automation that triggers when an item is created in your WorkForms Submission Viewer, and use the DocExport PDF Generator to create a PDF from the form response. Then, automatically attach the generated PDF to a file column in your table board, and use the “Connect Boards” feature to link the file column with your other board, ensuring seamless integration. This will allow you to automatically convert and display form submissions as PDFs in your table board.
